title: Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of His Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan of Brunei Darussalam to amend the arrangement between the Government of Brunei and His Majesty's Government for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to taxes on income made in 1950, as amended by an arrangement in 1968 and a supplementary arrangement in 1973, with Protocol
subject: TAXATION
